expectations.evidence: Step 0 (first instruction): 'Check the active model — On Haiku: stop immediately'. Model-guard is the very first step.
Exact quote: 'stop immediately: This command requires Sonnet or Opus...'
Stop message names both models with exact switch commands: /model sonnet or /model opus.

notes: Guard is bypassed for headless/HYDRA_HEADLESS=1 (intentional — Haiku builder container opts out).
